title: Binomial Theorem Visualization
description: A visual expansion of (a + b)^n showing how combinations determine coefficients
relationships: The expansion of (a + b)^n produces terms of the form C(n,k) * a^(n-k) * b^k
The coefficients C(n,k) come from the nth row of Pascal's Triangle
Each term's coefficient is calculated using the combination formula for choosing k items from n
